zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏空整理
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD价格位于76806.03美元附近，略低于20日均线SMA(20)的77555.98美元，显示短期价格承压，市场偏向整理或轻微下行。日内高点77278美元与低点76619.02美元区间波动有限，表明多空双方均在试探支撑与阻力，行情缺乏明确突破动力。

MACD指标显示主线为-36.57293，处于零轴下方，暗示空头动能占优，短线可能延续弱势整理。尽管RSI数据缺失，但价格下行未跌破前期低点，显示抛压有限，潜在支撑在76600美元附近，若跌破该位置，则可能加速下行至76200美元附近。

阻力方面，近期上方压力集中在SMA(20)附近的77550美元及前高77278美元水平，多头若要重启反弹需突破此区间，否则仍以区间震荡为主。成交量变化可关注突破时的确认信号，以判断趋势延续性。

交易策略上，短线可保持观望或低吸附近支撑的策略，控制仓位和设置止损。对于偏好趋势交易者，可等待MACD走平并形成金叉或价格突破SMA(20)及前高后再考虑加仓，多空均需关注关键支撑与阻力位的确认。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently exhibiting a mildly bearish tone after failing to sustain gains above the 77,200 USD mark. The latest price at 76,806.03 USD reflects a minor 0.51% decline over 24 hours, suggesting a short-term pullback. The 20-day simple moving average (SMA) at 77,555.98 USD acts as immediate resistance, while intraday lows around 76,619 USD provide a near-term support zone. Overall, the price remains within a tight consolidation range, indicating indecision among market participants.  

The MACD value of -36.57 implies bearish momentum, as the signal line is currently unavailable, preventing a crossover confirmation. Despite this, the negative MACD suggests that selling pressure is slightly outweighing buying activity. Traders should watch for a potential MACD convergence with a signal line, which could indicate a trend reversal or continuation. The lack of RSI data limits overbought/oversold evaluation, so price action relative to moving averages and key support/resistance levels becomes crucial.  

Support levels to monitor include 76,619 USD, with a stronger secondary floor near 76,000 USD, which has historically absorbed selling pressure. Resistance is clear at the 20-day SMA near 77,555 USD and higher around 77,800 USD, where previous highs met supply. A decisive break above these levels could trigger renewed bullish momentum, whereas a drop below the 76,619 USD support might open the path toward lower consolidation zones near 75,500 USD.  

Short-term trading strategies favor cautious positioning. Traders might consider range-bound tactics, buying near support with tight stops and targeting the SMA for profit-taking. Conversely, short positions could be explored if momentum strengthens below the current support levels, with careful attention to volume and confirmation indicators. Overall, risk management is essential given Bitcoin’s consolidation and mixed technical signals.
